ad_texts:
Fresh off the line 👀 Our Crunchies in production! Perfectly crisped for that signature Pip’s texture.

Built with care, dialed for crunch, and now made with avocado oil 🥑
Crunch without compromise. Non GMO verified and made with real ingredients, Pip’s delivers big flavor in every bite.

Irresistibly cheesy. Perfectly crunchy. 🧀

Our heirloom corn Cheddar Cheese Balls are baked, not fried, and made with avocado oil and real cheddar cheese. 🥑
